heading: Patents for designs
label: 171 Patents for designs

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Whoever invents any new, original and ornamental design for an article of manufacture may obtain a patent therefor, subject to the conditions and requirements of this title.

children.heading: .—Applicability of This Title
children.label: b .—Applicability of This Title
children.text: The provisions of this title relating to patents for inventions shall apply to patents for designs, except as otherwise provided.

children.heading: .—Filing Date
children.label: c .—Filing Date
children.text: The filing date of an application for patent for design shall be the date on which the specification as prescribed by section 112 and any required drawings are filed.
